tEn: Command A: An Enterprise-Ready Large Language Model
tZh: Command A：一款面向企业的强大语言模型
sEn: Command A is an enterprise-ready LLM with agent optimization, multilingual support, and hybrid architecture for efficient RAG and tool use.
sZh: Command A 是一款面向企业的大型语言模型，具备智能体优化、多语言支持和混合架构，在检索增强生成和工具使用方面表现出色。
absEn: In this report we describe the development of Command A, a powerful large language model purpose-built to excel at real-world enterprise use cases. Command A is an agent-optimised and multilingual-capable model, with support for 23 languages of global business, and a novel hybrid architecture balancing efficiency with top of the range performance. It offers best-in-class Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) capabilities with grounding and tool use to automate sophisticated business processes. These abilities are achieved through a decentralised training approach, including self-refinement algorithms and model merging techniques. We also include results for Command R7B which shares capability and architectural similarities to Command A. Weights for both models have been released for research purposes. This technical report details our original training pipeline and presents an extensive evaluation of our models across a suite of enterprise-relevant tasks and public benchmarks, demonstrating excellent performance and efficiency.
absZh: 本报告描述了 Command A 的开发过程，这是一款专为实际企业用例而设计的强大大型语言模型。Command A 是一款针对智能体优化且支持多语言的模型，支持全球商业中使用的 23 种语言，并采用新颖的混合架构，在效率与顶级性能之间取得平衡。它提供了一流的检索增强生成（RAG）能力，具备基础事实核查和工具使用功能，可自动化复杂的业务流程。这些能力是通过分散式训练方法实现的，包括自我改进算法和模型合并技术。我们还提供了 Command R7B 的结果，该模型在能力和架构上与 Command A 相似。两个模型的权重均已发布用于研究目的。本技术报告详细介绍了我们的原始训练流程，并在企业相关任务和公共基准测试中对我们的模型进行了广泛评估，展示了出色的性能和效率。

contrib.en: Developed Command A, an enterprise-ready LLM with agent-optimized and multilingual capabilities.
contrib.zh: 开发了Command A，一个面向企业的LLM，具备智能体优化和多语言能力。

contrib.en: Introduced a novel hybrid architecture balancing efficiency and top-tier performance.
contrib.zh: 引入了一种新颖的混合架构，平衡了效率与顶级性能。

contrib.en: Achieved best-in-class RAG with grounding and tool use for automating business processes.
contrib.zh: 实现了具有基础事实和工具使用的最佳RAG，用于自动化业务流程。

contrib.en: Employed decentralized training with self-refinement and model merging techniques.
contrib.zh: 采用了包含自我优化和模型合并技术的去中心化训练方法。

contrib.en: Released Command R7B with shared capabilities and architectures for research.
contrib.zh: 发布了具有共享能力和架构的Command R7B，供研究使用。

contrib.en: Provided extensive evaluation on enterprise tasks and public benchmarks showing excellent performance.
contrib.zh: 在企业任务和公共基准上进行了广泛评估，展示了卓越的性能。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to enterprise tasks and public benchmarks; real-world deployment may vary.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于企业任务和公共基准；实际部署可能有所不同。

limits.en: Model weights released for research only; commercial use may require additional licensing.
limits.zh: 模型权重仅用于研究发布；商业使用可能需要额外许可。

limits.en: Hybrid architecture may not generalize to all domains or tasks beyond enterprise use.
limits.zh: 混合架构可能无法泛化到企业用途之外的所有领域或任务。

limits.en: Decentralized training approach may introduce reproducibility challenges.
limits.zh: 去中心化训练方法可能引入可重复性挑战。

limits.en: Multilingual support limited to 23 languages; coverage may be insufficient for global deployment.
limits.zh: 多语言支持仅限于23种语言；覆盖范围可能不足以支持全球部署。
